loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD compliance (I-THD) and voltage THD compliance (V-THD) — per-phase harmonic distortion (H5, H7) and flicker/crest factor are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) and voltage THD (V-THD) trends; per-order harmonics (H5/H7) are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing load-percent-of-rated as a proxy for K-factor stress — true K-factor is not measured for this UPS asset.
